title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: I was about to leave the office when the phone rang.
questions.secondSentence: I was (1) _________ the office when the phone rang.

questions.firstSentence: It is unlikely that the weather will improve tomorrow.
questions.secondSentence: There is (1) _________ the weather improving tomorrow.

questions.firstSentence: He was unable to explain why he was late for the meeting.
questions.secondSentence: He was unable to (1) _________ his lateness for the meeting.

questions.firstSentence: It's a pity you didn't tell me about the problem earlier.
The only thing I want is a quiet holiday.
Despite the rain, the match went ahead.
